releaseNotes:
v0.24.6 — Daily FDA recall auto-check.

The app now fetches openFDA on launch (debounced to once per 24 hours) and persists matches to recall_match_history so the DSCSA audit pack's recall_history CSV stays current automatically. A red banner appears at the top of the dashboard when matches are found, with a tap-to-review action. The Recalls screen shows a 'Last checked' line so freshness is visible at a glance.

Includes everything from v0.24.5: one-tap DSCSA audit pack export, Quarantine status with full sync support, persistent FDA recall match history.
